title: verbascum × dupnicense
intro: Verbascum × dupnicense, also known as Dupnitsa mullein, is a hybrid species of Verbascum, a genus of flowering plants in the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where its leaves and flowers are used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Verbascum × dupnicense include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat coughs, sore throats, and other respiratory problems.
